arts.ttl: Stephen O'Donnell reveals 'devastating' Motherwell injury timing as he makes Mr Reliable pledge to get in starting XI
arts.sum: Defender has seen off a number of Fir Park right backs in the last four years.

Friday night football comes to Fir Park as Motherwell host Kilmarnock, both teams having emerged victorious in the Scottish Premiership last weekend. Motherwell clinched a third successive league vic...
